narrative:
Clearcreek Township has 763 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points.
